# BOUH Terrain Radar Android APK Builder V12

Android WebView APK project for BOUH Terrain Radar.

Developer: Eng. Ahmed Abu Aziza Al-Rashidi

Build via GitHub Actions:
Actions → Build BOUH Terrain Radar APK → Run workflow → download app-debug.apk.

The app loads `file:///android_asset/index.html` and enables JavaScript, DOM storage, file access, and geolocation permissions.
